risks.title: Multiple rapid changes to Security.tsx without verification
risks.evidence: 4 modification events to Security.tsx within 17 seconds (2026-04-27T19:02:22-19:02:39). High relevance events (0.95, 0.85) indicate substantive changes to critical module.
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review Security.tsx diff, run security tests, and verify no auth/encryption logic regressions

risks.title: Event deduplication failure in code-observer
risks.evidence: 50% of events tagged as duplicates with identical/near-identical timestamps (< 2ms apart). Event IDs: 1a8ac5bf (dup of 2f805734), feeb32e1 (dup of 1d184a43)
risks.recommendedAction: Audit code-observer event filtering logic to prevent duplicate noise in future analysis

opportunities.title: Add automated security module tests
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx has no mentioned test coverage in recent changes. Multiple rapid edits increase regression risk.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create test suite for Security.tsx covering auth flows, encryption, and permission checks

opportunities.title: Implement pre-commit hooks for security files
opportunities.evidence: Security-critical files (Security.tsx) lack gating mechanism before changes propagate
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add git hook to run security lints and tests before committing to security module

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes and validate
taskCandidates.description: Inspect the diff of Security.tsx changes made in the last 17 seconds. Verify no auth/encryption logic was broken, credentials weren't exposed, and security tests pass.
taskCandidates.rationale: Multiple rapid changes to critical security module require immediate human review

taskCandidates.title: Create security module test suite
taskCandidates.description: Write unit and integration tests for Security.tsx covering authentication, authorization, and encryption paths
taskCandidates.rationale: High-velocity changes to security module need automated regression detection

taskCandidates.title: Fix event deduplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Improve duplicate detection to filter events within same millisecond or with identical file/classification
taskCandidates.rationale: Reduces noise in future event analysis and improves signal quality

recommendations.title: Prioritize security module validation
recommendations.rationale: 4 events in 17 seconds on Security.tsx is abnormal velocity. High-relevance events (0.85+) indicate substantial logic changes.
recommendations.action: Run: git diff HEAD~1 src/screens/Security.tsx && npm run test:security (if exists)

recommendations.title: Establish gating for security-sensitive files
recommendations.rationale: Prevent unvetted changes to auth/encryption logic by requiring approval
recommendations.action: Add CODEOWNERS entry for src/screens/Security.tsx requiring human review on PR

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes and validate
